name: Arthur State Bank
description_short: Family-owned independent bank offering personal and business checking, savings, mortgages, loans, and wealth management services with digital banking tools.
description_long: Arthur State Bank is an independent, family-owned bank that has maintained continuous operation under its original founding families, positioning itself as a institution rooted in tradition and community commitment. The bank serves both personal and business customers with a comprehensive suite of financial products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, personal and business loans, mortgage lending, and trust and wealth management services. The bank distinguishes itself through personalized service combined with modern digital capabilities, including online banking, mobile app access, cash management tools, and innovative features like MyCardRules for debit card controls. Arthur State Bank operates physical locations in South Carolina and emphasizes low down payment mortgages without PMI for first-time homebuyers, along with specialized lending programs for healthcare professionals and military personnel.
services: Mortgage lending with online mortgage center
Cash management and remote deposit capture
pros: Family-owned and independent bank with legacy stability and long-standing community roots
Offers mortgages with low down payment options and no PMI for first-time homebuyers
Comprehensive digital services including online banking, mobile app, and remote deposit capture
MyCardRules feature allows customers to control debit cards with transaction limits and instant alerts
Dedicated trust and wealth management services for estate planning and personalized wealth goals
Free mobile banking when opening a checking account
Specialized lending programs for healthcare professionals and military personnel (Hometown Heroes)
cons: Geographic limitations appear restricted to South Carolina based on website closing procedures
No mention of competitive interest rates or rate comparisons for savings products
Limited information on fees, minimum balance requirements, or APR details for loans and credit products
best_for: First-time homebuyers in South Carolina seeking low down payment mortgages without PMI
Healthcare professionals and military personnel with access to specialized lending programs
Business owners requiring comprehensive business banking, cash management, and remote deposit services
High-net-worth individuals seeking professional trust and wealth management services
diagnosis: Arthur State Bank is best for South Carolina residents seeking traditional full-service banking with personal relationships combined with modern digital tools, particularly first-time homebuyers and business owners. The main caveat is that the bank appears geographically limited to South Carolina, and specific pricing, rates, and fee structures are not disclosed on the public website.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
